## Problem

What operator or product problem does this solve?

## Proposed change

Describe the smallest useful improvement.

## Why it matters

- buyer demo value
- operator value
- security value
- developer ergonomics

## Notes

Call out whether this is:
- real production capability
- local demo enhancement
- docs or UX polish
